evidence_summary: Establish the transition from a terrestrial survival situation to a cosmic inciting incident through a visual pull toward Mars. The sequence must move from the grounded, rocky textures of an Arizona night into a VFX-driven transcendence into deep space.
Fleeing the cave into the Arizona night, the protagonist gazes at Mars. He feels an irresistible magnetic pull toward the red planet and is suddenly whisked away through space into darkness.
Protagonist fleeing from a cave into the rocky nightscape.
Total darkness within the deep space void.
Fleeing -> Gazing at Mars -> Feeling magnetic pull -> Whisked into space.
